pytorch.reason: pure numpy probe; torch not required for isometry algebra checks

pyg.reason: no graph structure in Stinespring dilation

z3.reason: UNSAT proof: completeness constant c != 1 is structurally incompatible with Stinespring isometry condition V†V = I; c > 0 AND c != 1 AND c == 1 is UNSAT

cvc5.reason: z3 covers UNSAT completeness proof; separate cvc5 run not needed

sympy.reason: Symbolic proof that V†V = K0†K0 + K1†K1 = I holds for amplitude damping for all gamma in (0,1); proves isometry condition algebraically not just numerically

clifford.reason: no Clifford algebra in isometry construction

geomstats.reason: no Riemannian geometry in dilation axioms

sympy_vdagv_identity_proof.proof: V†V = K0†K0+K1†K1 = [[1,0],[0,(1-γ)+γ]] = I for all γ∈(0,1). Key step: (1-γ)+γ = 1 holds symbolically in sympy.

complementary_channel_ad.note: E^c(|0><0|) = diag(1,0): env stays in |0> when input is ground state. K0|0>=|0> contributes 1, K1|0>=0 contributes 0.

non_cptp_trace_violation.note: A0=sqrt(0.8)*I, A1=sqrt(0.4)*Z: sum A†A = 1.2*I; trace=1.2 > 1 (TP violated); V†V = 1.2*I ≠ I (not an isometry). ok=True means correctly detected as non-CPTP.

transpose_choi_negative_eigenvalue.note: T(rho)=rho^T: Choi matrix = SWAP, eigenvalues {-1,1,1,1}. Min eigenvalue = -1 in unnormalized Choi convention (J = sum_{i,j} |i><j| x T(|i><j|)); -0.5 in normalized convention. Negative spectrum certifies non-CP; no valid Stinespring isometry. ok=True means correctly detected via Choi negativity.

z3_non_completeness_unsat.proof: c > 0 AND c != 1 AND c == 1 is UNSAT: non-unit completeness constant is structurally incompatible with Stinespring isometry. No Stinespring decomposition exists for non-TP maps.

identity_channel_dilation.note: k=1: V = I2, no environment entanglement; Tr_env is trivial; exact identity recovery

ad_gamma_zero.note: gamma=0: K1=zero matrix; zero Kraus op contributes nothing; V†V=I still holds

ad_gamma_one_reset.note: gamma=1: K0=|0><0|, K1=|0><1|; any input resets to |0><0|. Dilation recovery: |1><1| → |0><0| exactly via Tr_env.

dephasing_p_one.note: p=1: K0=zero, K1=Z; pure Z channel (phase-flip). |+> → |−> exactly. Zero Kraus op K0 contributes nothing but isometry still holds.
